use_cases: Displaying security threat category statistics in dashboards
Comparing categorical data values with visual bar representations
Showing animated metric cards with trend indicators alongside chart data
Presenting ranked category comparisons with color-coded bars
ai_summary: A horizontal bar chart component with animated metric cards displaying security threat categories (Brute Force, Web Attack, Malware, etc.) with trend indicators. Uses Reaviz for chart rendering and Framer Motion for entrance animations, styled with a vibrant purple-cyan-blue gradient palette. Suitable for analytics dashboards and data-heavy SaaS applications.
